description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a metallic silver upper and a thick, white, cushioned sole. The shoe features a padded white collar and tongue, providing extra comfort and support around the ankle. The lacing system consists of six eyelets with matching silver laces, and the stitching is visible along the side panels and around the toe box, adding subtle detailing. The sole is smooth and slightly rounded, designed for both style and comfort, and the overall silhouette is modern and chunky. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, light-colored material for added comfort. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A metallic silver low-top sneaker with a thick white sole, padded collar, and silver laces, featuring a modern, chunky silhouette.
description_view_0: Side view showing the metallic silver upper, white padded collar, and thick white sole with visible stitching.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, six silver eyelets with matching laces, and the padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same metallic silver upper and thick white sole, with subtle stitching details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the white padded heel collar and the back curve of the thick sole.
